nodes.name: a-b-testing
nodes.description: Systematic split-testing protocol for ads, audiences, and landing pages — test design, sample sizing, significance thresholds.

nodes.name: ad-copywriting
nodes.description: Direct-response ad copywriting for headlines, descriptions, CTAs, and hooks across Meta and Google Ads. Avoids AI slop; cites canon.

nodes.name: agent-inbox
nodes.description: Async agent-to-agent messaging protocol. Use when Bravo, Atlas, Maven, Aura, or Codex needs to pass a structured message to another agent without blocking the orchestrator. Replaces synchronous-only delegation with a checkpoint-based pickup pattern. CLI backed by scripts/agent_in

nodes.name: audience-targeting
nodes.description: Audience-strategy playbook — behavioral targeting, custom audiences, lookalikes, exclusions, keyword segmentation.

nodes.name: auto-generated
nodes.description: Container for skills synthesized at runtime by skill_synthesizer.py. Each child directory is a [NEW] skill with its own SKILL.md + metrics.json. Promoted to skills/<slug>/ after 3 successful uses (skill_metrics.py promote).

nodes.name: brand-guidelines
nodes.description: Applies Anthropic's official brand colors and typography to any sort of artifact that may benefit from having Anthropic's look-and-feel. Use it when brand colors or style guidelines, visual formatting, or company design standards apply.

nodes.name: browser-automation
nodes.description: Playwright-driven browser automation for ad-library scraping, competitor research, and UI flow verification.

nodes.name: budget-optimization
nodes.description: Budget reallocation and pacing rules across ad sets and channels. Drives spend toward winning creative under CFO caps.

nodes.name: campaign-creation
nodes.description: End-to-end campaign-creation workflow: objective, structure, audience, creative, budget, launch verification.

nodes.name: codex-delegation
nodes.description: Intelligent routing between Bravo and Codex — decides when to delegate tasks to Codex vs handle internally

nodes.name: competitive-intelligence
nodes.description: Systematic competitor tracking, battlecard generation, market monitoring, and competitive response playbook for OASIS AI, PropFlow, and Nostalgic Requests

nodes.name: content-engine
nodes.description: Use this skill whenever the user asks about generating content, writing posts, creating marketing copy, running the content engine, or organizing content creation. Includes formats, tones, and strategies.

nodes.name: elite-video-production
nodes.description: Complete automated video production system for CC's content pipeline. Use whenever CC provides raw video footage and says "make this a post", "edit this", or asks for a cinematic output. Replaces a human video editor entirely. Covers hook engineering, pacing, caption styling, col

nodes.name: email-marketing
nodes.description: Send individual emails, run nurture sequences, and manage templates using email_engine.py and free Gmail SMTP. Zero paid ESP. All sends tracked in Supabase.

nodes.name: email-outbound
nodes.description: Marketing email blast operations — HTML templates, bulk send, deliverability, list hygiene, CASL/CAN-SPAM compliance.

nodes.name: email-safety
nodes.description: Mandatory contract for sending email/outreach from any AI (Claude, Gemini, Antigravity, Codex). Read this before invoking any send command. Disable-model-invocation false — ANY model that sends mail must read this first.

nodes.name: executing-plans
nodes.description: Use when you have a written implementation plan to execute in a separate session with review checkpoints

nodes.name: funnel-management
nodes.description: Track leads through conversion funnels, measure stage-to-stage conversion rates, and identify where prospects are dropping off using lead_engine.py and direct Supabase queries.

nodes.name: google-ads-management
nodes.description: Google Ads operational playbook — campaigns, ad groups, keywords, bidding, negative-keyword discipline, quality score.

nodes.name: growth-engine
nodes.description: Self-learning and evolution system. Tracks capability expansion, extracts patterns from experience, promotes patterns to SOPs, identifies skill gaps, and produces evolution reports. Triggers after complex tasks, failures, and monthly audits.

nodes.name: hyperthink
nodes.description: Maximum-depth reasoning protocol. Wraps Claude Code's native ultrathink (31,999 thinking tokens) with a structured multi-hypothesis framework. Fires on architectural decisions, multi-root-cause debugging, or expensive-to-reverse choices.

nodes.name: image-generation
nodes.description: Production-grade AI ad imagery — prompt patterns, brand compositing, human-centered psychology, anti-slop standards.

nodes.name: knowledge-management
nodes.description: Use this skill whenever the user wants to capture, organize, retrieve, or maintain business intelligence. Covers PARA implementation, information capture protocols, progressive summarization, retrieval frameworks, freshness scoring, template library management, and weekly mainten

nodes.name: lead-generation
nodes.description: Lead-generation funnel construction — lead magnets, tripwires, gated content, qualified-lead routing into CRM.

nodes.name: lead-management
nodes.description: End-to-end lead lifecycle: capture -> qualify -> nurture -> handoff. Lead scoring, CRM architecture, automation rules, re-engagement, SLA windows, multi-touch attribution. Industry-standard methodology (Ross, Holmes, Hormozi, Sandler, Miner) + vertical pack extensions.

nodes.name: lending-industry
nodes.description: MCA/business-funding compliance and vocabulary rules. Use when working SunBiz or any regulated lending vertical.

nodes.name: linkedin-outreach
nodes.description: Use the CLI-Anything wrapper to send connection requests and messages on LinkedIn, completely bypassing UI/browser restrictions.

nodes.name: marketing-research
nodes.description: Systematic market, audience, competitor, and trend research. Diagnosis-before-prescription (Ritson). Non-leading customer interviews (Fitzpatrick). Audience discovery without survey bias (Fishkin). Positioning research before copy (Dunford).

nodes.name: mcp-operations
nodes.description: Tool routing guide — CLI-first for credential services, MCP for stateless tools. Single source of truth for all agents.

nodes.name: media-upload
nodes.description: Media upload pipeline for Meta, Google, Late, and Shopify. Format conversion, codec, aspect-ratio handling.

nodes.name: memory-compression
nodes.description: claude-mem plugin — automatic cross-session memory compression and injection via SQLite + semantic search. Captures tool usage, compresses observations, and injects relevant context at session start.

nodes.name: memory-management
nodes.description: MemoryBox system for preventing bloat, scoring confidence, compressing archives, and maintaining memory hygiene. Ensures cross-session intelligence without context window overflow.

nodes.name: meta-ads-management
nodes.description: Meta Ads operational playbook — Special Ad Categories, Andromeda creative diversity, ad-set structure, audience overlap.

nodes.name: performance-optimization
nodes.description: Campaign optimization protocol — winner promotion, killer thresholds, fatigue detection, statistical confidence.

nodes.name: persona-content-creator
nodes.description: Create, organize, and distribute content across Workspace.

nodes.name: python-daemon-automation
nodes.description: Build, deploy, and manage Python background daemons on Windows — includes 5-step redeploy protocol, watchdog patterns, zombie process detection, and kill switches

nodes.name: reporting-analytics
nodes.description: Cross-platform performance reporting — metric reconciliation, ROAS modeling, dashboard generation, narrative writing.

nodes.name: retro
nodes.description: Weekly retrospective analysis. Use when CC says "/retro", "weekly retro", "how did we do this week", or "what shipped this week". Analyzes all agent activity, rates 4 operational dimensions, and generates specific improvement actions.

nodes.name: security-protocol
nodes.description: Secrets and authentication management. Ensures API keys, tokens, and credentials are NEVER exposed in plain text. Use when handling any credential, API key, or sensitive configuration.

nodes.name: self-healing
nodes.description: Auto-recovery patterns for marketing automations — token refresh, retry policies, fallback channels, dead-letter queues.

nodes.name: self-improvement-protocol
nodes.description: The 4-protocol loop every C-Suite agent runs to stay sharp: self-heal (detect+fix broken state), self-optimize (track+tune own performance), self-develop (fill capability gaps), self-improve (learn from outcomes). Installs in Bravo / Atlas / Maven / Aura with per-agent scoping.

nodes.name: send-gateway

nodes.name: seo-aeo
nodes.description: Search Engine + Answer Engine Optimization — keyword research, schema, AI-citable content structure, on-page tuning.

nodes.name: ship

nodes.name: sop-breakdown
nodes.description: Automatically creates, refines, and executes Standard Operating Procedures. Triggers when a process is repeated 3+ times or when CC requests an SOP. Extracts steps from observed behavior, tracks success rates, and evolves SOPs over time.

nodes.name: subagent-driven-development
